domain: Avicenna (Ibn Sina, 980-1037 AD) Canon of Medicine (1025 AD) Persian medical encyclopedia: 10 named pulse types (long/short/rapid/slow/even/uneven/spindle-shaped/two-shock/wavy/trembling) assessed on 5 properties (weak-strong, slow-fast, regular-irregular, large-small, hard-soft) at radial-wrist site; 2-movement-2-pause pulsation model (correction to Galen); used alongside urine + stool + temperature + 4 humors for cross-modal diagnosis
specific_mechanism: AVICENNA-10-PULSE-TYPE-5-PROPERTY-2-STATE-MULTI-AXIS-EVAL: evaluation diagnostic with (1) 5-property × 2-state matrix M_5x2: every model output evaluated on 5 properties (info-content low-high, decode-speed slow-fast, style regular-irregular, length low-high, confidence soft-hard) → 10-bit signature; (2) 10 named pulse-type templates T_10: matrix signatures classified into 10 templates with diagnostic interpretation per template; (3) 2-movement-2-pause oscillation model: output decomposed into 2 active-token movements + 2 pause-token rests revealing generation rhythm; (4) 4-modal cross-synthesis: combine pulse-classification with retrieval-relevance (urine-equivalent) + attention-pattern (stool-equivalent) + decoding-temperature (temperature-equivalent) → 4-signal joint diagnosis; (5) wrist-site easy-access default: minimal-perturbation probing — one short prompt eliciting all 5 properties simultaneously. Differs from R506 NDERI-3-ELDER (3-elder LLM judge tribunal + besa-oath confidence + precedent-case-base + retraction penalty + nderi family-honor system-prompt-family) and R531 IFA-8-BIT-ODU-256-SIGNATURE-EVAL (8-bit binary signature + 256-verse corpus + 8-round palm-nut + babalawo interpreter + 16×16 compositional rubric tree) by 5-property × 2-state 10-bit + 10 named pulse-type templates + 2-movement-2-pause oscillation + 4-modal cross-synthesis + wrist-site easy-access minimal probe.
llm_application: AVICENNA-10-PULSE-TYPE-5-PROPERTY-2-STATE-MULTI-AXIS-EVAL evaluation diagnostic + 5-property × 2-state matrix M_5x2 10-bit signature + 10 named pulse-type templates T_10 long-short-rapid-slow-even-uneven-spindle-two-shock-wavy-trembling + 2-movement-2-pause oscillation rhythm decomposition + 4-modal cross-synthesis pulse+retrieval+attention+temperature + wrist-site easy-access minimal-perturbation probe. Differs from R359. R430. R445. R456. R466. R481. R494. R506 NDERI (closest — 3-elder + besa-oath + precedent + retraction). R531 IFA (closest — 8-bit + 256-verse + palm-nut + babalawo + 16x16). Differs from Rubric-Based Evals + LLM-Rubric Multidim + 15 Metrics + Benchmarking 2026 by 5×2 matrix + 10 pulse-templates + 2-2 oscillation + 4-modal + wrist-site. Differs by 5-PROPERTY × 2-STATE 10-BIT + 10 NAMED PULSE-TYPE TEMPLATES + 2-MOVEMENT-2-PAUSE OSCILLATION + 4-MODAL CROSS-SYNTHESIS + WRIST-SITE EASY-ACCESS PROBE.
novelty_claim: Rubric-Based Evals 2026 + LLM-Rubric Multidim 2501.00274 + 15 Evaluation Metrics + Benchmarking 2026 cover multi-rubric + multi-dim space. AVICENNA-10-PULSE-TYPE-5-PROPERTY-2-STATE-MULTI-AXIS-EVAL adds (a) 5-property × 2-state matrix + (b) 10 named pulse-type templates + (c) 2-movement-2-pause oscillation + (d) 4-modal cross-synthesis + (e) wrist-site easy-access probe. Recombination — borderline lookup.
